prompt: Show Docker container resource usage statistics using docker stats.

create_files.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Simulated docker binary for test environment
if [ "$1" = "stats" ]; then
  echo "CONTAINER ID   NAME            CPU %   MEM USAGE / LIMIT     MEM %   NET I/O          BLOCK I/O"
  echo "a1b2c3d4e5f6   web-frontend    0.25%   64MiB / 512MiB        12.50%  1.2kB / 648B     8.19MB / 0B"
  echo "f6e5d4c3b2a1   cache-redis     0.10%   32MiB / 256MiB        12.50%  856B / 432B      4.1MB / 0B"
fi
